$comment: Layer C for TRANSFER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The qualified BAL references resolve to unique names (SRC-ACCT-BAL / DST-ACCT-BAL); the source balance is a never-assigned VALUE constant, so the decline condition WS-AMOUNT + WS-FEE > 1000.00 is affine-plus-one-rounded-term - the boundary is inverted through the ROUNDED fee store, and the fee's half-cent congruence is solved on both the approved and declined paths.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TRANSFER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-transfer)
